# GiteaSource class

Retrieves available releases from a Gitea repository.

```js
class GiteaSource
```

Create a new GiteaSource.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `repoUrl` | `string` | The URL of the Gitea repository (e.g. "https://gitea.com/myuser/myrepo"). |
| `accessToken` | `string` | Optional Gitea access token (sent as `Authorization: token {token}`). (optional) |
| `prerelease` | `boolean` | If true, pre-releases will also be searched/downloaded. (optional) |
